title: Phase 3: Scheduler, skills, and prompts tests
description: Write or update tests for scheduler.py, skills.py, and prompts.py config integration. Verify scheduler uses config values for lease timeout, followup suffixes, corrective attempts. Verify skills.py derives skills dir from config. Verify prompts.py fallback behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify scheduler uses config lease_timeout_minutes
Tests verify scheduler uses config followup_suffixes and corrective_suffix
Tests verify scheduler uses config max_corrective_attempts
Tests verify scheduler uses config transient_block_patterns
Tests verify skills.py derives skills dir from config backend
Tests verify prompts.py fallback to constants when config not provided
All tests pass with uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
